What We Do

Complete Export Solutions

From sourcing to shipment, we manage every step of international trade with precision and care.

01
🌿

Premium Sourcing

Only verified, certified suppliers. Every product audited for origin and international-grade quality.

02
🚢

Export Logistics

Full shipping coordination, freight forwarding, and real-time cargo tracking from India to destination.

03
📜

Trade Compliance

FSSAI, APEDA, and destination-country import documentation — fully handled for smooth clearance.

04
🤝

Buyer Partnerships

We build long-term relationships with international buyers. Trust is our most traded commodity.

05
📦

Custom Packaging

Export-compliant branded packaging designed to destination market standards and buyer specs.

06
📊

Market Intelligence

Current pricing, demand trends, and regulatory updates in target markets to sharpen your advantage.

Arabica
Our Flagship Product

Single-Origin
Indian Coffee

Hand-picked from high-altitude estates in Karnataka and Kerala, our Arabica beans are shade-grown, sun-dried, and export-graded to the highest international standards. Rich aroma, clean finish, and full traceability from farm to shipment.

Karnataka / Kerala

Why Choose Us

Built on Integrity

Verified Supply Chain

Every supplier is audited and certified. Zero compromise on product origin, safety, or quality standards.

End-to-End Ownership

Full responsibility from source to shipment. One contact, complete accountability, zero surprises.

Regulatory Expertise

Deep knowledge of FSSAI, APEDA, and international import laws for compliant clearance every time.

Long-Term Relationships

We grow with our buyers. Repeat business and referrals are our most meaningful measure of success.
